# tfe_org_max_token_ttl_policy

Retrieves the maximum time-to-live (TTL) policy for API tokens in an organization. This data source fetches the current TTL limits for organization, team, audit trail, and user tokens from the database.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.

### Read-Only

- `audit_trail_token_max_ttl` (String) Maximum lifespan allowed for audit trail tokens in human-readable duration format (e.g., '30d', '6mo', '2y').
- `audit_trail_token_max_ttl_ms` (Number) Maximum lifespan allowed for audit trail tokens in milliseconds.
- `org_token_max_ttl` (String) Maximum lifespan allowed for organization tokens in human-readable duration format (e.g., '30d', '6mo', '2y').
- `org_token_max_ttl_ms` (Number) Maximum lifespan allowed for organization tokens in milliseconds.
- `team_token_max_ttl` (String) Maximum lifespan allowed for team tokens in human-readable duration format (e.g., '30d', '6mo', '2y').
- `team_token_max_ttl_ms` (Number) Maximum lifespan allowed for team tokens in milliseconds.
- `user_token_max_ttl` (String) Maximum lifespan allowed for user tokens in human-readable duration format (e.g., '30d', '6mo', '2y').
- `user_token_max_ttl_ms` (Number) Maximum lifespan allowed for user tokens in milliseconds.
